summary: Phase 4 Kiosk/Tablet Mode testing complete. All backend APIs pass (16/16 tests). Frontend fully functional with profile CRUD, kiosk mode, scene templates, and child mode features.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/profiles - List all profiles (requires admin)
Backend: POST /api/smarthome/profiles - Create profile with kiosk_mode and child_mode
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/profiles/{id} - Get single profile with enriched data
Backend: DELETE /api/smarthome/profiles/{id} - Delete profile
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/my-profile - Get current user's profile
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/scene-templates - Returns 5 default templates (Gute Nacht, Aufstehen, Lernen, Spielen, Filmabend)
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/rooms - List rooms
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/devices - List devices
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - List users for profile assignment
Backend: GET /api/audit-log - Get audit log
Frontend: SmartHomeAdmin page loads with all 5 tabs (RÄUME, GERÄTE, FREIGABEN, PROFILE, AUDIT-LOG)
Frontend: PROFILE tab shows profile list with KIOSK and KIND badges
Frontend: Profile creation form with name, room selection, user assignment, kiosk/child mode checkboxes
Frontend: VORSCHAU (preview) links include profile ID in URL (/kiosk?profile=xxx)
Frontend: Delete button works for profiles
Frontend: Kiosk Mode page loads without LCARS sidebar (fullscreen layout)
Frontend: Kiosk Mode shows clock display with date/time
Frontend: Kiosk Mode shows all 5 scene templates
Frontend: Kiosk Mode with profile param shows admin preview
Frontend: Child mode shows 'Was möchtest du tun?' heading and larger UI
Frontend: Child mode hides exit button
Frontend: Non-child mode shows 'Szenen' heading and exit button
Frontend: Admin without profile param sees profile selector page
Frontend: Voice assistant button visible in kiosk mode
seed_data_creation: None - using existing profiles (Kinderzimmer Tablet, Test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Kiosk/Tablet Mode fully tested. All profile CRUD operations work. Kiosk mode renders correctly with/without child mode. Scene templates (Gute Nacht, Aufstehen, Lernen, Spielen, Filmabend) display correctly. Admin preview with profile param works. No devices synced (HA not connected - expected). Existing profiles: 'Kinderzimmer Tablet' (kiosk+child, Kinderzimmer room) and 'Test' (kiosk+child, Luzia room, assigned to admin user).

mocked_apis_list: Home Assistant REST API (HA not installed - expected)
mocked_apis.note: HA sync/control endpoints fail gracefully. Scene execution would work if HA was connected.
